name: Allegion Schlage and Access Control Platform API
what_it_does: Allegion Schlage and access control REST API for enterprise security integrators, commercial real estate operators, and smart building developers to manage electronic lock credentials, access schedules, and door hardware monitoring across Allegion's Schlage, Von Duprin, LCN, and Interflex product lines — enabling HRIS-driven credential provisioning, remote door management, and integration with PACS, BMS, and building automation systems through Allegion's cloud-connected hardware. Enables AI agents to manage credential provisioning for Schlage mobile credential automation, handle access schedule for time-based door permission automation, access audit trail for compliance reporting automation, retrieve device status for hardware monitoring automation, manage keypad PIN for backup credential automation, handle visitor credential for temporary access automation, access remote lock for contactless door management automation, retrieve integration data for PACS system automation, manage firmware update for device management automation, and integrate Allegion with SSO, HRIS, and building management systems for enterprise physical security automation.
use_cases: Provisioning Schlage mobile credentials for enterprise employee access via HRIS automation agents
Managing Schlage electronic lock schedules and access permissions for commercial real estate automation agents
Accessing door hardware audit trails and access events for security compliance reporting automation agents
Integrating Allegion Schlage with PACS and BMS for smart building access control automation agents
not_for: Consumer residential smart locks without commercial deployment (Schlage's consumer line has limited API)
High-security government PIV/FICAM-certified systems (Allegion Interflex handles government grade)
Video surveillance and camera management (Allegion is lock hardware only, not full PSIM)
best_when: An enterprise security integrator or commercial real estate operator wanting AI agents to manage Schlage electronic lock credentials, access schedules, and hardware monitoring through Allegion's cloud-connected access control platform.
avoid_when: PRODUCT LINE FRAGMENTATION: Allegion has multiple product lines (Schlage, Von Duprin, LCN, Interflex, ISONAS) with different APIs; automated unified Allegion API assumption creates product-specific errors; automated must identify specific product line (Schlage commercial vs Interflex) and use appropriate API. SCHLAGE CONNECT CLOUD VS ENGAGE GATEWAY: Schlage commercial has different connectivity models (Schlage Control, Schlage Encode, mobile access via NDE/LE readers); automated single-model assumption creates hardware capability mismatch; automated must verify lock model supports desired connectivity. CERTIFIED INTEGRATOR REQUIRED: Allegion technology partner program requires certification; automated direct API access assumption without partner status creates no public API access; automated must register as Allegion Technology Partner. HARDWARE SELECTION IS INSTALLATION-DEPENDENT: Different Schlage product families (B-series mortise, ND/NDE cylindrical, Control smart locks) have different capabilities; automated universal hardware control assumption creates feature unavailability; automated must configure for installed hardware model.

auth.notes: Allegion uses OAuth 2.0 for technology partner API authentication. REST API with JSON. Carmel, Indiana HQ. NYSE:ALLE. Spun off from Ingersoll Rand 2013. Products: Schlage (commercial, residential), Von Duprin (panic hardware), LCN (door closers), Interflex (enterprise PACS), ISONAS (IP access control), Assa Abloy competitor. SDKs: None public. Technology partner program for API access. ISO 27001, SOC 2. GDPR. 11,000+ employees, 130+ countries. Competes with ASSA ABLOY and dormakaba globally.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Technology partner sandbox; production requires Allegion partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Technology partner program; project-based pricing through dealers; hardware cost separate
pricing.notes: Carmel IN. NYSE:ALLE. Technology partner program for API. ISO 27001, SOC 2. Hardware required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; credential and event APIs throttled per partner agreement

known_agent_gotchas: TECHNOLOGY PARTNER PROGRAM REQUIRED: Allegion API access requires approved Technology Partner status; automated open API access assumption creates no available endpoint; automated must register and get approved as Allegion Technology Partner before API development

PRODUCT LINE DETERMINES API: Allegion has distinct APIs for Schlage commercial, Interflex enterprise, and ISONAS; automated unified Allegion API assumption creates product-family mismatch; automated must identify installed product line and target appropriate API

SCHLAGE LOCK MODEL CAPABILITIES VARY: Different Schlage models have different capabilities (some support mobile credentials, some PIN-only, some hardwired only); automated universal feature assumption creates capability_not_supported; automated must query device capabilities before credential provisioning

DEALER CHANNEL FOR HARDWARE: Allegion hardware is sold through authorized dealer/distributor network; automated direct hardware procurement creates dealer channel requirement; automated must work through Allegion authorized dealer for hardware component of deployment

WEBHOOK SIGNATURE VERIFICATION: Allegion webhook events require signature verification; automated unverified webhook processing creates security vulnerability; automated must verify webhook signature header before processing access events
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise access control. SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Physical access and employee identity data. NYSE:ALLE.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise access control. SOC 2, ISO 27001. OAuth2. US. Physical access and identity data. NYSE:ALLE.
